Ship recycling market is experiencing the same volatility and uncertainty
tjhhha nt hthue global economy is going through as the supply chain disruption
rip s through the glo bal economy and the commodities market are eager
to rally on every news. Steel prices have seen a slight correction in the
subcontinent nations with buyers remaining cautious due to dramatic price
fluctuations and waiting for prices to stabilise. On the supply front, there
is extreme shortage of tonnage in the recycling market as the surging
ocean freight rates have made the owners hold onto their assets tightly.
